scripts.android:sync: npm run build && cap sync android
scripts.android:apk: set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.11.10-hotspot" && set "ANDROID_HOME=C:\AI\Android\sdk" && set "PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%ANDROID_HOME%\platform-tools;%PATH%" && npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug && cd .. && npm run android:copy-apk
scripts.android:copy-apk: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force 'C:\AI\Android' | Out-Null; Copy-Item -LiteralPath 'android\app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk' -Destination 'C:\AI\Android\jiujiu-personal-player-debug.apk' -Force; Copy-Item -LiteralPath 'android\app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk' -Destination 'C:\AI\Android\jiujiu-personal-player-v1.0.16-debug.apk' -Force"
